channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLbusinessAndMarkets
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLbusinessAndMarkets, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 1 Type of Brain Game Could Lower Dementia Risk by 25%, According to a 20‑Year Study
item.description: The research found that older adults who completed a specific speed-training exercise were significantly less likely to develop dementia. Others aren’...

item.title: Paramount sweetens its bid for Warner Bros. Discovery with ‘additional benefits’
item.description: Paramount is again sweetening its hostile takeover bid for Warner Bros. Discovery, while again extending the deadline for its tender offer as it scram...

item.title: How U.S. Transportation Infrastructure Could Change Forever Under Trump
item.description: A design guidebook and an ideas competition are in the works.

item.title: Target CEO shuffles leadership team as his first big move after taking over
item.description: Target CEO Michael Fiddelke is reshuffling his leadership team and making other changes shortly after stepping into the top job at the retailer that h...

item.title: The type of coffee you drink may matter more for your brain than how much
item.description: Don’t feel bad splurging on that $7 latte the next time you’re in a midafternoon attention slump. A new study published in The Journal of the American...

item.title: How CSR Shapes Loyalty, Reputation, and Long-Term Success
item.description: Four reasons that supporting your community pays off.

item.title: Salesforce Reorganizes Leadership While Cutting Around 1,000 Jobs
item.description: The software company earlier said AI is ‘core’ to its products.

item.title: Shark Tank Star Kevin O’Leary Says You’re ‘Stupid’ If You Work This Many Hours Per Day
item.description: The celebrity investor once touted workaholism, but has since changed his tune.

item.title: TikTok’s trinket trading trend taps into the joy of being offline
item.description: On a sidewalk, an unassuming junction box sits strapped to a fence. Inside, dozens of keychains, stickers, mini figurines, and other novelties wait to...

item.title: Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick admits to meeting Epstein, reversing previous claims
item.description: Under questioning from Democrats Tuesday, Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick acknowledged that he had met with Jeffrey Epstein twice after his 2008 con...

item.title: Citadel and Cathie Wood back Zero, a new blockchain designed for traditional finance
item.description: LayerZero launches its layer-1 blockchain Zero with partners Intercontinental Exchange and the DTCC.

item.title: One reason CEOs tie layoffs to AI? It motivates remaining employees to adopt the technology
